title: [FE-22] Frontend Framework Setup & Design System
body:
## Overview
Set up the frontend project with a component library, design system, shared layouts, and global conventions. All other frontend issues build on top of this.

## Tech Recommendations
- **Framework**: Next.js (App Router) — SSR/SSG for SEO, good DX
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui (accessible, unstyled components)
- **State management**: React Query (TanStack Query) for server state; Zustand for minimal client state
- **Forms**: React Hook Form + Zod validation
- **Charts**: Recharts (lightweight, for price history charts)
- **Icons**: Lucide React

## Tasks

### Project Setup
- [ ] Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- [ ] Install and configure shadcn/ui
- [ ] Set up TanStack Query with global error/loading handling
- [ ] Set up Zustand store for auth state (access token, user profile)
- [ ] Configure API client (typed `fetch` wrapper that automatically sets `Authorization` header)

### Design System
- [ ] Define color palette: primary (brand), background, surface, muted, success, warning, danger
- [ ] Define typography scale (heading, body, caption, label)
- [ ] Create shared components:
  - `<GameCard>` — cover image, title, best price badge, discount badge
  - `<PriceBadge>` — shows current price + original price crossed out
  - `<DiscountBadge>` — shows "-75%" badge with color coding by discount depth
  - `<BuyButton>` — always uses referral URL from API
  - `<StoreIcon>` — logo for each store
  - `<LoadingSpinner>`, `<EmptyState>`, `<ErrorState>`

### Layout
- [ ] Root layout with: sticky header (logo, search bar, nav links, auth CTA), footer (links, affiliate disclosure), ad slots
- [ ] Responsive layout: full sidebar on desktop, hamburger menu on mobile
- [ ] SEO: default `<meta>` tags, Open Graph, JSON-LD for game pages
- [ ] Set up `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` (dynamically generated from game slugs)

### Accessibility
- [ ] All interactive elements have keyboard focus states
- [ ] Images have `alt` text
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA

## Acceptance Criteria
- `npm run dev` starts the frontend against the local API
- Reusable components render correctly in a component showcase (Storybook optional but nice)
- Lighthouse score ≥ 90 on Performance, Accessibility, SEO for the homepage

## Dependencies
- #1 Tech Stack Selection & Project Scaffolding
- #13 Core Game & Deals REST API

comments.author: unknown
comments.body:
## ❓ Clarification Needed

CADRE identified the following ambiguities in **#22** that require clarification before proceeding:

- API shape (endpoints, response types) from #13 is not specified — component props and API client types need to be inferred or stubbed
- Ad slots mentioned in layout but no ad provider or placement strategy is specified
- StoreIcon requires store logos but the list of stores and logo asset sources are not defined
- Referral URL API endpoint and response shape for BuyButton are not specified
- JSON-LD structured data type and required fields for game pages are not clarified
- Dynamic robots.txt and sitemap.xml depend on game data API not yet available — unclear whether to stub or build full dynamic generation
- Storybook is described as optional — unclear whether a component showcase is expected
- Zustand auth store shape and auth flow details (login, logout, token refresh) are not specified
